flow.description: block used to update VS Order Line after related Jira task is marked as DONE.
flow.name: UpdateVirtualShopOrderLine

labels.label:
Attributes used:

- http_invoke.target_url
- http_invoke.headers.authorization
- http_invoke.method
- http_invoke.mime_type

- http_invoke.max_retries (default 3)
- http_invoke.counter - always sets to zero at beginning
